label: portfolio-optimization
description: ML-driven portfolio optimization engine that recommends rebalancing actions based on market conditions, risk appetite, and ESG constraints.

label: anomaly-detection-workflows
description: Systems that detect anomalies and optimize workflows across trade reconciliation, IT incidents, payment fraud, and cross-border payment routing using pattern recognition and time-series analysis.

label: intelligent-automation-assistants
description: AI-powered assistants and classifiers that automate KYC screening, complaint routing, fraud detection, knowledge retrieval, code review, onboarding, sentiment analysis, and risk assessment across banking operations.

label: document-intelligence
description: Automated extraction, summarization, and analysis of financial documents including loan applications, regulatory reports, meeting notes, ESG data, contracts, and client briefings using NLP and structured output.
